commands.repair_reason: External PR needs contributor-provided real behavior proof plus a security-aware rebase/rewrite; missing proof makes this human-only rather than an automation repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff changes runtime egress routing and can bypass operator proxy policy for media-provider traffic.; Review finding: [P2] Require NO_PROXY before bypassing loopback media targets — src/infra/net/proxy-fetch.ts:136-140 - [P2]... (sha=fc5b8536de85f9f30432554aa56a469a0d59e5ca)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves media audio/video proxy fetch resolution until after provider baseUrl is known and adds custom NO_PROXY/loopback bypass matching plus regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible for the CIDR/target-aware gap: current main resolves the media proxy fetch before baseUrl is known, while Undici's EnvHttpProxyAgent no_proxy matcher does not support CIDR entries. I did not run a live self-hosted STT backend in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: External PR needs contributor-provided real behavior proof plus a security-aware rebase/rewrite; missing proof makes this human-only rather than an automation repair lane.
